pyrene-capped oligos in 1X PBS
4 hours ddt
overnight pyrene-capped oligos
tracking dirac curves (dirac pt, etc), not time-series tests
func started on 3/10/26, analyte tested on 3/11

same func as 2026-03-05, but 4 hours ddt instead of 2

4 wells are separated with acrylic wells. Wells tested with analyte separately. Data channels are as follows:

The analytes are tested in wells:
(1): Pos ctrl, complement oligo
(2): NONE
(3): Neg ctrl, scrambled oligo
(4): 1X PBS blank

The respective channels are:
(1): 6, 8, 11, 13, 14, 15
(2): NONE
(3): 0, 1, 2, 4, 5
(4): 3, 7, 9, 10, 12

    TOP
-----------
| (1)|(2) |
-----|----|
| (4)|(3) | 
-----------


Volumes and concentrations used:
functionalization:
    2mM DDT, 4 hours
    5uM pyrene-capped oligos, overnight
analyte:
    1aM, 100aM, 10fM, 1pM, 100pM, 10nM, 1uM
    Starting with 30uL in each well
    Adding 3uL to each well every analyte step, without replacement
    Add concentration every 30mins incubate 15mins + take measurements ~15mins




FIGURE OUT WHICH STEP I DID 2X BY ACCIDENT - ITS EITHER 10F OR 1P
